_doc: Curated per-cell corrections for balance-sheet rows the deterministic extractor cannot recover because of one-off OCR/render artifacts in the source PDF (stray glyphs, comma-for-dot markers, values wrapped off the label line). Each entry carries the exact values READ FROM THE PDF and a note citing the artifact. Applied post-extraction in src/audit_reports/loader.py:upsert_report, keyed by (bank_ticker, period, kind, statement, hierarchy): the matching row's amounts are corrected, or the row is inserted if the parser dropped it. NOT for genuine source defects where the bank's own digits don't foot — those stay flagged. amount_total is authoritative; amount_tl+amount_fc must equal it.

overrides.note: stray 'v' glued before marker ('vXIV.') dropped the equity row
ECL marker garbled to '1. B1.e4kl'; values legible, row not recognised as 1.1.4 child
comma-for-dot markers ('I,'); roman I section row dropped
